title: Forever Winter
description: Makes all biomes on the overworld snowy.
body:
# ❄️ Forever Winter
Turn your world into a winter wonderland! **Forever Winter** transforms all Overworld biomes into snowy landscapes, perfect for those who wants a _chilling_ world, a somewhat challenging world, an atmospheric world to take screenshots with that shaders of yours

there's this resource pack, [Winter Time](https://modrinth.com/project/kqygRbcY) by [SirJumpy8772](https://modrinth.com/user/SirJumpy8772), in case you wanted the texture to be changed to fit with the winter theme

## ✅ Features
- **All Biomes Covered in Snow:** All biomes' temperature have dropped to negatives and to the point of freezing oceans and covering all hot biomes such as: Deserts, Badlands, Savannas and their variations in snow
- **Only the biomes are changed**: It's the only thing it changes, whether you want the world to be snowing forever or snowing normally is up to you

### ⚙️ Compatibility
- **Vanilla**
  - **Versions:** 1.19.4 – 1.21.5

## 📸 Screenshots
[More in the Gallery page](https://modrinth.com/project/forever-winter/gallery)

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DUCm4YCg/images/a5cf90b6dbc408733ade254500ab8f4d64c06379.png)

## 📑 Plans
- Support custom biomes, such as in [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith) for example.
